name: Backstage Catalog Entity
description: A catalog entity in Backstage representing a software component, API, resource, system, domain, group, user, location, or template within the software catalog.

apiVersion.description: The version of the entity schema. Typically 'backstage.io/v1alpha1' or 'backstage.io/v1beta1'.

kind.description: The high-level type of the entity.

spec.description: The specification data describing the entity, specific to its kind.

type.description: The more specific type of the entity within its kind (e.g., service, library, openapi, grpc).

lifecycle.description: The lifecycle stage of the entity (e.g., experimental, production, deprecated).

owner.description: An entity reference to the owner of this entity (e.g., group:default/my-team).

system.description: An entity reference to the system this entity belongs to.

subcomponentOf.description: An entity reference to the parent component.

providesApis.description: Entity references to APIs provided by this component.

consumesApis.description: Entity references to APIs consumed by this component.

dependsOn.description: Entity references to components or resources this entity depends on.

dependencyOf.description: Entity references to components that depend on this entity.

definition.description: The definition of the API, such as an OpenAPI spec string or a reference to one.

memberOf.description: Group entity references that a user is a member of.

members.description: User entity references that are members of a group.

parent.description: Entity reference to the parent group.

targets.description: Targets for a Location entity pointing to catalog-info.yaml files.

parameters.description: Template input parameters schema for Template entities.

steps.description: The sequence of actions to execute for a Template entity.

output.description: Output definitions for a Template entity.

relations.description: Relations to other entities, typically populated by the catalog processors.

uid.description: A globally unique identifier for this entity, assigned by the catalog.

etag.description: An opaque string that changes on every update, used for optimistic concurrency.

name.description: The name of the entity, unique within its kind and namespace.

namespace.description: The namespace the entity belongs to.

title.description: A human-readable title for the entity.

description.description: A human-readable description of the entity.

labels.description: Key-value labels attached to the entity.

annotations.description: Key-value annotations attached to the entity (e.g., backstage.io/managed-by-location).

tags.description: Tags associated with the entity for filtering and grouping.

links.description: External hyperlinks related to the entity.

title.description: A human-readable title for the link.

icon.description: An icon identifier for the link.

type.description: The type of link (e.g., dashboard, runbook, documentation).
The type of relation (e.g., ownedBy, ownerOf, consumesApi, providesApi, dependsOn, partOf).

targetRef.description: The entity reference of the target entity (e.g., group:default/my-team).

items.description: A list of status items for the entity.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

picture.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

id.description: A unique identifier for this step within the template.

name.description: A human-readable name for the step.

action.description: The scaffolder action to execute (e.g., fetch:template, publish:github).

if.description: A conditional expression that determines whether the step should execute.
